name: Pritpal Singh
tagline: I build, break, and rebuild products — usually with too much coffee and a soft spot for marketplaces, AI, and 0→1.
longIntro: I'm a product person who lives at the intersection of growth, AI, and storytelling. I've built and scaled experiments across SaaS, ride-hailing, real estate, and content platforms — usually starting from a vague problem and a blank Figma file.

My favourite kind of work is the quiet, unglamorous loop: spot a friction, sketch the hypothesis, run the experiment, measure honestly, and decide what gets to ship next. I care more about retention than launches, more about taste than templates.
Right now I'm leading SEO-led organic growth at Omniful, building autonomous content workflows in n8n, and writing product teardowns about the marketplaces that quietly shape our days.
